productDisplayName: Black coffee Men Micheal Blue Slim Fit Shirt

Feel comfortable in the soft cotton and look great in the plaid checks. Team with simple chinos for knockout weekend style. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
